title: Crossbow Auto Release
description: Automatically releases crossbow once it is charged.
body:
# Crossbow Auto Release

Automatically releases crossbow charge once the bow is able to be released.

Tired of manually timing your crossbow charge releases when in combat? Annoyed when your crossbow is not charged even though the animation of it fully charged has been played? Then this mod is for you!

Note that this mod does NOT auto-shoot the bow once its charged.
